title: Bionano Genomics Stock Forecast & Predictions: 1Y Price Target $6.00
text: Bionano Genomics (BNGO) stock forecast analysis indicates a 1-year price target of $6.00 based on consensus analyst estimates. This represents substantial upside potential from current trading levels around $1.27. The forecast is driven by several key catalysts: reimbursement rate increases and new CPT code expansion, improving unit economics and gross margins, growing installed base utilization, potential path to profitability by late 2027, and possible balance sheet improvements through debt retirement. Technical indicators show mixed signals with bearish short-term bias but bullish longer-term setup. Fundamental analysis supports the bull case given: strong clinical evidence for OGM, expanding reimbursement coverage, recurring revenue from consumables, and operational leverage opportunity. Risk factors include slower-than-expected adoption, competitive threats, funding requirements, and technology obsolescence risk.
